mapper.select: SELECT BASKET_NO, MG.NO AS NO, MG.GROUP_NO AS GROUP_NO, M.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME, G.GROUP_TITLE AS GROUP_TITLE, G.IMG_URL1 AS IMG_URL, G.COMMENT1 AS COMMENT1, G.START_DATE AS START_DATE, G.REG_DATE AS REG_DATE, G.LAST_DATE AS LAST_DATE, G.CATEGORY AS CATEGORY, MG.PRICE AS PRICE FROM BASKET MG LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON MG.NO = M.NO LEFT JOIN GROUP_MORAK G ON MG.GROUP_NO = G.GROUP_NO WHERE MG.STATUS = 1 ORDER BY BASKET_NO
